mapper.select: SELECT a.userid, a.email, a.firstname, a.lastname, a.status, a.addr1, a.addr2, a.city, a.state, a.zip, a.country, a.phone, a.role, p.langpref, p.favcategory, p.mylistopt, p.banneropt, s.username, s.password FROM account a LEFT JOIN profile p ON a.userid = p.userid LEFT JOIN signon s ON a.userid = s.username WHERE a.userid = #{userid}

SELECT a.userid, a.email, a.firstname, a.lastname, a.status, a.addr1, a.addr2, a.city, a.state, a.zip, a.country, a.phone, a.role, p.langpref, p.favcategory, p.mylistopt, p.banneropt, s.username, s.password FROM account a LEFT JOIN profile p ON a.userid = p.userid LEFT JOIN signon s ON a.userid = s.username WHERE s.username = #{username} AND s.password = #{password}

SELECT a.userid, a.email, a.firstname, a.lastname, a.status, a.addr1, a.addr2, a.city, a.state, a.zip, a.country, a.phone, a.role, p.langpref, p.favcategory, p.mylistopt, p.banneropt, s.username, s.password FROM account a LEFT JOIN profile p ON a.userid = p.userid LEFT JOIN signon s ON a.userid = s.username ORDER BY a.userid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account (userid, email, firstname, lastname, status, addr1, addr2, city, state, zip, country, phone, role) VALUES (#{userid}, #{email}, #{firstname}, #{lastname}, #{status}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{city}, #{state}, #{zip}, #{country}, #{phone}, #{role})
INSERT INTO profile (userid, langpref, favcategory, mylistopt, banneropt) VALUES (#{userid}, #{langpref}, #{favcategory}, #{mylistopt}, #{banneropt})
mapper.update: UPDATE signon SET password = #{password} WHERE username = #{username}
